name: Builder Anti-Patterns
summary: Common mistakes to avoid when building Alberta government service prototypes

antiPatterns.name: Hero banner on interior pages
antiPatterns.description: Using GoabHeroBanner on pages other than the main landing page. Hero banners should only appear once as the entry visual.

bad.description: Putting hero banner on every page

good.description: Hero only on landing, use GoabPageBlock with heading on interior pages

antiPatterns.name: Build dependencies imported in runtime code
antiPatterns.description: Importing build tools (vite, webpack, @vitejs/*, babel, @types/*) in application source files. These are not available at runtime and break the preview.

good.description: Only import runtime-safe packages in src/ files

antiPatterns.detection: Look for imports from: vite, @vitejs/*, webpack, @babel/*, @types/*

antiPatterns.name: Collecting personal info without privacy notice
antiPatterns.description: Forms collecting personal information must include a FOIP (Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy) notice.

good.pattern: <GoabCallout type="information" heading="Privacy notice">Information collected is used to...</GoabCallout>

antiPatterns.name: Government jargon instead of plain language
antiPatterns.description: Using bureaucratic language that citizens don't understand. Write at grade 8-9 reading level.

bad.pattern: Submit your application for adjudication pursuant to Section 12(b) of the Act.

good.pattern: Send your application. We'll review it and let you know the decision.

antiPatterns.name: Desktop-only layout assumptions
antiPatterns.description: Fixed widths or layouts that break on mobile devices. Use responsive GOA components.

antiPatterns.name: No error handling for API failures
antiPatterns.description: Not showing users what went wrong when API calls fail.

good.pattern: catch (e) { setError('Unable to load. Please try again.'); }

antiPatterns.name: Using title case instead of sentence case
antiPatterns.description: Alberta Design System uses sentence case for headings (capitalize first word only).

antiPatterns.name: Reference number not prominent on confirmation
antiPatterns.description: After submission, the reference number should be visually prominent so users can easily save it.
